full_text:
Big omental tumor with some fibrotic tissue.

Tumor was minced in 20 ml of AdF++ with dispase and DNAse according to the protocol.

RBC lysis was done using 4ml of the buffer.

Final pellet was resuspended in 8 ml of the culture medium

Cell count 1):

total: 11.0E6/mL

live: 6.74E6/mL

viability: 61.4%

size: 8.6 um

Cell count 2):

total: 10.7E6/mL

live: 5.67E6/mL

viability: 52.8%

size: 8.1 um

Total cell count: 10.85E6/mL

Total volume: 8mL

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

15 conditions, 6 replicates per condition = 90 wells

90 wells x 40 µl x = 3600 µl → round up to 3700 uL (=1233 x3)

1000 cells/µl = 1.233 E6 * 3 tubes

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1233 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

ORG full medium → (1027.1-113.6) = 913.5

ome-gel → 173.8 µl

aprotinin → 3.7 µl

thrombin → 3.7 µl

fibrinogen → 24.7 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium + 50 ul of each of the diluted drugs (or media) per well next day up to a final volume of 500 uL

B) Drug treatment for IF (384 well plate):

Same treatment conditions as in 48 wells

4 replicates per condition. 20ul/ well

Prepare 2 tubes of OmGel mix, same as for 48 wells ( 1233 ul). Plate 20ul /well

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 19 uL medium per well + 9 ul of diluted drugs (or media) per well next day

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1 E6 cells* 2 tubes for ab stain and disdain control, per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Freeze 10 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (x 4 vials)

The organoids were cultured for

High-content imaging: prepare one 384-well plate as follows:

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
